description: UI Spotlight — Daily trending GitHub UI reproduced as live interactive demos

days.title: Magnetic Cursor Buttons
days.description: Spring-physics magnetic buttons that bend toward your cursor, with a soft glowing blob follower — the portfolio trend of 2025.
days.source: Pattern popularized across GitHub (e.g. nicholasgasior/magnetic-button, codrops, Awwwards portfolios)

interaction.mouse: Move near buttons to feel the magnetic pull
interaction.click: Click any button to trigger a burst ripple
interaction.touch: Tap buttons on mobile — magnetic effect on desktop only
